task_name: Nginx Access Log - Find Largest Responses
notes: Excellent execution. All requirements met with high accuracy: correct top 10 responses (3318, 3316, 3301, 2582, 2578, etc.), accurate distribution stats (min=1, max=3318, mean=367.55, median=337), correct zero-byte count (290 with proper 304/200/403 breakdown), and insightful efficiency analysis. Minor deduction: two identical markdown files created (large_responses_report.md and large_responses_report_1.md) suggests possible redundancy, though content is correct. Report is professional, comprehensive, and well-structured with actionable insights.
